name: C&h Brown Sugar Cornbread Muffins
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup (packed) C and H Dark Brown sugar
1/4 cup (1/2 stick) melted butter or margarine
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, mix together the cornmeal, flour, brown sugar, baking powder, and salt.
2. In another bowl, whisk together the milk, beaten egg, and melted butter.
3. Gradually add the liquid mixture to the dry ingredients, stirring until just combined.
4. Grease 12 muffin pans and fill each about 2/3 full with the batter.
5. Bake in a preheated oven at 425°F (220°C) for 20 minutes, or until the muffins are golden brown.
6. Makes 12 muffins.
